title: Diagnose and fix Giga terminal vs BigClungus impl

log.context: Diagnose and fix Giga terminal vs BigClungus impl

Done. Here's the full diagnosis and what was fixed:

---

**Root cause: Two bugs in `GIGA_HTML`'s JavaScript — wrong ttyd protocol**

**Bug 1 — Missing init message (critical)**

ttyd v1.7.4 does not spawn a PTY or stream any terminal output until the client sends a specific JSON handshake on connection open:
```json
{"AuthToken": "", "columns": <cols>, "rows": <rows>}
```
The old code sent nothing on `ws.onopen`. Without this message, ttyd sits idle — no child process is spawned, no terminal ou...(truncated)
